records.name: Meta Ad Library API - Nevada political and social issue ads
records.coverage: Facebook, Instagram, Messenger, and Meta technologies political/social issue ads delivered in the United States. Nevada targeting can be reviewed through regional delivery metadata when available.
records.notes: Use this for source-backed digital ad captures once META_AD_LIBRARY_ACCESS_TOKEN is configured. Raw captures should remain in review until source metadata and sponsor fields are checked.

records.name: Google Political Ads Transparency data - Nevada
records.coverage: Google political ads transparency exports and public data for advertiser, spend, geography, and creative metadata when available.
records.notes: Drop reviewed Google export JSON at data/imports/political-ads/google-political-ads.json for later normalization.

records.name: FEC independent expenditure filings - Nevada federal races
records.coverage: Federal independent expenditures and communication spending related to Nevada federal candidates and committees.
records.notes: Useful for spend/accountability context. FEC records usually do not provide full ad creative, so they should be linked as source context rather than full ad records unless creative evidence is attached.

records.name: Nevada Secretary of State campaign finance advertising spend
records.coverage: Nevada campaign finance expenditure records with media, mail, digital, print, radio, television, and advertising vendor categories.
records.notes: Useful for ad-spend discovery and sponsor/vendor leads. Expenditure records are not automatically full ad records without creative/source attachment.

records.name: Manual reviewed Nevada political ad intake
records.coverage: Screenshots, mailers, SMS captures, broadcast links, platform archive links, and other reviewed public ad evidence.
records.notes: Use this for the first production-safe ad records. Every record must include sourceReferences or a public source URL before it is imported as reviewed.
